form.formComment: Good performance to win by half a length at Sandown over 515m (29.67) beating Fast Freddy in Grade 5 on April 2. Key chance on that latest effort.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Ordinary effort last start when she got back too far over 512m at Mt Gambier. Prior to that won by a nose at Mt Gambier (29.33) beating Galento in a OPEN on March 29. Leading contender.

form.formComment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when third (30.19) over 525m at this track. Drawn close to the inside. Prefer others.

form.formComment: Finished second (30.27) at this track last time making it three placings in a row. Awkward draw to overcome. Worth including.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (30.21) over 525m at this track. Awkward draw to overcome. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Strong performance racing just off the speed and going on to score by a neck in a Grade 5 last start at Sandown, recording a useful 29.49 over the 515m journey. Expecting another bold showing.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th over 525m at this track beaten 6 lengths (30.52) behind Sharapova Star in a Free For All on April 4. Has clocked an outstanding 29.83 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

form.formComment: Improved sharply when second behind In A Bit at Bendigo last start over 500m (28.02). Has good early speed and will stick on.
